creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
Dear Vladimir,
thank you for asking. According to the discussion on https://github.com/ranger/ranger/issues/272#issuecomment-215179378 the root cause it in python as http://bugs.python.org/issue7384.

The fix proposed by myself helps only for a few cases. I am not sure how such a situation should be handled. I have no problem if the patch would be rejected and the bug closed because the root cause is not within ranger. I have trust in the experienced people here at FreeBSD to know the best way to proceed. This includes the original reporter, too.

Kind regards,
Christoph
